2605.10488.title: DeepRefine: Agent-Compiled Knowledge Refinement via Reinforcement Learning
2605.10488.paper_summary: Agent-compiled knowledge bases provide persistent external knowledge for large language model (LLM) agents in open-ended, knowledge-intensive downstream tasks. Yet their quality is systematically limited by \emph{incompleteness}, \emph{incorrectness}, and \emph{redundancy}, manifested as missing evidence or cross-document links, low-confidence or imprecise claims, and ambiguous or coreference resolution issues. Such defects compound under iterative use, degrading retrieval fidelity and downstream task performance. We present \textbf{DeepRefine}, a general LLM-based reasoning model for \emph{agent-compiled knowledge refinement} that improves the quality of any pre-constructed knowledge bases with user queries to make it more suitable for the downstream tasks. DeepRefine performs multi-turn interactions with the knowledge base and conducts abductive diagnosis over interaction history, localizes likely defects, and executes targeted refinement actions for incremental knowledge base updates. To optimize refinement policies of DeepRefine without gold references, we introduce a Gain-Beyond-Draft (GBD) reward and train the reasoning process end-to-end via reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent downstream gains over strong baselines.
2605.10488.paper_summary_zh: 代理編譯的知識庫為大型語言模型（LLM）代理在開放式、知識密集的下游任務中提供持久的外部知識。 然而，它們的質量系統性地受到\emph{不完整性}、\emph{不正確性}和\emph{冗餘}的限制，表現為缺失的證據或跨文檔鏈接、低信心或不精確的主張，以及模糊或共指解析問題。 這些缺陷在迭代使用中會加劇，降低檢索的準確性和下游任務的表現。 我們提出\textbf{DeepRefine}，一種基於LLM的推理模型，用於\emph{代理編譯的知識精煉}，旨在通過用戶查詢提高任何預構建知識庫的質量，使其更適合下游任務。 DeepRefine與知識庫進行多輪互動，並對互動歷史進行溯因診斷，定位可能的缺陷，並執行針對性的精煉行動以進行增量知識庫更新。 為了在沒有金標準參考的情況下優化DeepRefine的精煉策略，我們引入了增益超越草稿（GBD）獎勵，並通過強化學習端到端訓練推理過程。 大量實驗表明，在強基準上持續獲得下游增益。
2605.10488.author: Haoyu Huang et.al.
2605.10488.authors: Haoyu Huang, Jiaxin Bai, Shujie Liu, Yang Wei, Hong Ting Tsang, Yisen Gao, Zhongwei Xie, Yufei Li, Yangqiu Song
